name: Wb-live - classifier server manual single execution - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — inactive, manual single execution, configure URL/token in n8n UI, no secrets in Git.

Wb-live manual test: n8n -> classifier-server via Tailscale.

Before running:
1) Start classifier-server-v1.mjs on Ryzen (bind 127.0.0.1 or RYZEN_TAILSCALE_IP, never 0.0.0.0)
2) Set CLASSIFIER_SERVER_URL in the HTTP Request node (replace **CLASSIFIER_SERVER_URL**)
3) Optional: set X-Classifier-Token header value in n8n UI only (replace **CLASSIFIER_AUTH_TOKEN_OPTIONAL**)
4) Keep workflow INACTIVE — run Manual Trigger ONCE

This template: no Telegram, no Data Table, no GitHub write, no workflow 40/41, no PM-34. Single POST to /classify only.

EXPECTED RESPONSE (PASS):
HTTP 200 with classifier 5-field output only:
  risk, route, reason, confidence, requires_human

For this docs-only event expect: risk=low, route=auto_allowed, requires_human=false.

BLOCKED if: server unreachable, auth failure, non-200, invalid JSON, fallback:model_error / fallback:invalid_json / fallback:missing_keys, schema invalid, any secret/token leakage, or workflow becomes active.

After run: copy sanitized evidence to docs/workflow-wb-live-classifier-server.md, then use docs/runtime/WB_LIVE_REGISTRATION_PROMPT.md.

nodes.name: NOTE - expected response and PASS BLOCKED
